text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sometime after the Yasuda Kinen, Hishi Akebono
tells me she's been feeling a strange sensation in
her legs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A test reveals that this is the result of chronic
stress. After bearing her large physique through
so many races, her joints are starting to give.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I worry about her future and recommend she slim
down and change her running style, as to protect
her knees and prolong her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Hishi Akebono isn't convinced by the
new plan. She knows all her fans have come to
know and love her for her massive size.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Hishi Akebono asks for me to wait
three months until the Sprinters S. is over before
she makes her decision.
